requested_goal: Further reduce current cost 920 by at least 100, ideally below 50, using reconstruction/image-rule reasoning.
rule_inferred_from_images_and_generator: Input contains non-overlapping red hollow rectangles on a black square grid; output is black everywhere except each rectangle interior, which is green. Rectangles have width/height 2..9; grid size is 10/15/20/25; no interior exists when width or height <=2.
reason: No newly constructed candidate with cost <=820 satisfied all required exact-visible/official/fresh/runtime/structure checks. The best verified safe candidate remains the prior cost-920 model.

attempts.outcome: Rejected. Local patches have identical sampled neighborhoods with different required labels for task338; no exact deterministic local rule under these stencils was confirmed.

attempts.family: single local Conv, groups=5, dilated/rectangular area<=40
attempts.outcome: Rejected. Red/black channel separated local linear filters cannot reliably distinguish large-rectangle interiors from background across generated examples; no exact scorer-passing candidate was found.
Rejected. One-node low-rank Einsum was too slow under ORT DISABLE_ALL; multi-node rank-1 form was cost-reduced but too weak and did not match visible/arc-gen exactly.
Rejected. It creates cross-rectangle false positives and does not exactly model multiple independent rectangles.
Rejected. sparse_initializer is banned by the user and is also not accepted by the strict checker/scorer configuration for the needed Einsum relation.

validated_prior_candidate.note: These are the prior confirmed results for task338_improved.onnx; no lower-cost candidate superseded them.
